title: Section 38
content: (1) The Mayor may, by writing under his hand addressed to the Deputy Mayor and delivered to the 1[Municipal Secretary], resign his office. (2) The Deputy Mayor may, by writing under his hand addressed to the Mayor and delivered to the 1[Municipal Secretary], resign his office. (3) A resignation under sub-section (1) or sub-section (2) shall take effect from the date on which it is delivered.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 42 of 1961, s. 6, for Secretary (w.e.f. 12-9-1961).
